PowerShell(cd d:\\GBMjobhunter; $services = @\(3000, 3001, 3002, 3003\); foreach \($port in $services\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:$port/health" -TimeoutSec 3 -ErrorAction Stop; "Port $port`: UP \($\($r.StatusCode\)\)" } catch { "Port $port`: DOWN - $\($_.Exception.Message.Split\('.'\)[0]\)" } })

PowerShell(cd d:\\GBMjobhunter; $ports = @\(3000, 3001, 3002, 3003\); foreach \($p in $ports\) { $conn = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port $p -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "Port $p`: $\($conn.TcpTestSucceeded\)" })

PowerShell(cd d:\\GBMjobhunter\\services\\opportunity; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "index.js" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $conn = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 3003 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "Port 3003 up: $\($conn.TcpTestSucceeded\)")

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force; "Killed gateway PID $\($proc.OwningProcess\)" } else { "Gateway not running" })

PowerShell(cd d:\\GBMjobhunter\\gateway; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "index.js" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $conn = Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 3000 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue; "Gateway port 3000: $\($conn.TcpTestSucceeded\)")

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3005 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force }; cd d:\\GBMjobhunter\\services\\agent; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "index.js" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/auth/login" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"smoketest@gbm.local","password":"Smoke1234!"}'; $H = @{ Authorization = "Bearer $\($login.data.token\)" }; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/agent/health" -Headers $H | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=gbm_secret psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U gbm -d gbmjobhunter -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS total_resolved, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE outcome IN \('interview','offer'\)\) AS total_success FROM applications WHERE outcome <> 'pending';")

PowerShell(docker exec gbmjobhunter-postgres-1 psql -U gbm -d gbmjobhunter -c "SELECT u.email, u.resume_json->'skills' AS skills, a.outcome FROM applications a JOIN users u ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE a.outcome <> 'pending';")

PowerShell(docker exec gbmjobhunter-postgres-1 psql -U gbm -d gbmjobhunter -c "SELECT skill_cluster, cohort_size, finding FROM cohort_patterns WHERE pattern_type = 'skill_impact' ORDER BY skill_cluster;")

PowerShell($procs = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $procs | ForEach-Object { $cmd = \(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine; if \($cmd\) { "$\($_.Id\): $cmd" } })
PowerShell(docker exec -i gbmjobhunter-postgres-1 psql -U gbm -d gbmjobhunter -c "ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cover_letter_template TEXT;" 2>&1)
PowerShell(Get-Process node | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -eq '' } | Select-Object Id, CPU, StartTime | Sort-Object StartTime)
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in @\(3000,3001,3002,3003,3004,3005\) } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | Sort-Object LocalPort)

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3005 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force; Write-Host "Killed PID $\($proc.OwningProcess\) on port 3005" } else { Write-Host "Nothing on port 3005" })

PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/auth/login" -Method POST -Body '{"email":"test@example.com","password":"password123"}' -ContentType "application/json"\).data.token; Write-Host "Token: $\($token.Substring\(0,20\)\)..."; $body = '{"role":"Senior Software Engineer","company":"Acme Corp","jobDescription":"Distributed systems role."}'; try { Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/agent/generate-cover-letter" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"} -TimeoutSec 30 | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 3 } catch { Write-Host "Exception: $_"; $_.Exception.Response | ConvertTo-Json })

PowerShell($proc = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3005 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($proc\) { Stop-Process -Id $proc.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "--watch", "index.js" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\GBMjobhunter\\services\\agent" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:3005/agent/health" | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4)

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "d:\\GBMjobhunter\\web\\src\\pages\\OpportunitiesPage.jsx"; $lines[50..57] | ForEach-Object { $i = [array]::IndexOf\($lines, $_\) + 1; $chars = $_ | ForEach-Object { $_.ToCharArray\(\) | ForEach-Object { [int][char]$_ } }; "$i`: $_ [U+: $\(\($chars | Where-Object { $_ -gt 127 } | ForEach-Object { '{0:X4}' -f $_ }\) -join ','\)]" })
